title: Intense Spicy Ethiopian Baby Squid Stew
description: A sour and pillowy Ethiopian dish featuring baby squid, served in a dolsot stone bowl, perfect for curing hangovers.

ingredients.name: baby squid
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat the niter kibbeh in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger, and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the berbere spice and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the baby squid and cook until they start to brown.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Deglaze the pan with the red wine, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Add the fish stock, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the squid is cooked through.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the stew in a dolsot stone bowl, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions.
